emails.subject: EnronOnline ETA
emails.body: EnronOnline ETA I received a call from Martin Gajewski (612-984-3033) with Cargill Energy. He would like to make sure that the Master Agreement is the contract of resolution for terms and conditions of the product. He is specifically inquiring about paragraph 3F in the Electronic Trading Agreement. He would like a call back as soon as possible. Is it possible for you to contact him today? Thanks, Matt Motsinger 713-853-5221 EnronOnline Call Center

emails.subject: EnronOnline ETA

emails.subject: Re: EnronOnline ETA
emails.body: Re: EnronOnline ETA I have spoken with Martin and he is going to forward some proposed language to me. I will need to draft a reply letter to try and solve their issue. From: Matt Motsinger on 12/10/99 02:42 PM
